arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic sends Mikel Arteta a transfer message
arts.sum: Dusan Vlahovic sent Arsenal and Mikel Arteta a transfer message on Tuesday evening with a fantastic goal and impressive performance for Juventus . Vlahovic’s display will have impressed Arsenal manager Arteta, who is heavily reported to be weighing up a January bid for the player.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides injury update on key midfielder ahead of Carabao Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has spoken about Declan Rice's availability ahead of the quarter-final against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Club evaluate forgotten Arsenal attacker to cover exit – Already worked out ‘business model’
arts.sum: Brazilian side Internacional have made initial enquiries with Arsenal to sign forward Marquinhos as a replacement for Wesley. That’s according to GE Globo and UOL, who both report that the forgotten Arsenal man is being considered by Internacional as a replacement for their striker as he heads to Krasnodar. arts.ttl: “Coach really wanted me” – Player’s arrival at Crystal Palace was ‘not by chance’, now living dream with Eagles
arts.sum: Maxence Lacroix had to wait until summer deadline day to arrive at Crystal Palace from VfL Wolfsburg. The centre-back had previously played under Oliver Glasner at the Bundesliga side and reunited with the manager. In fact, it was the Austrian who signed him for Wolfsburg in 2020.
